function.name: query-features
function.description: Query and count features based on property values. Use this to get statistics about features on the map.

layerId.description: The ID of the layer to query. Default is 'points-layer'.

property.description: The feature property to filter by (e.g., 'name', 'type', 'region')

operator.description: The comparison operator. Use 'all' to count all features. Default is 'equals'.

value.description: The value to compare against (not required when operator is 'all')

includeNames.description: Whether to include sample feature names in the response. Default is false.
